title: CustomNPC Items
description: This mod created for GoodBird's CNPC port to 1.20, that mod adds some items and weapons from old CustomNPC mod
body:
### Description
This mod adds items and weapons from the old CustomNPC, but if in the original mod the items do nothing, then in our one, for example, a magic wand creates particles around itself when you press the RMB, and a broken bottle on impact creates the sound of glass breaking
Mod based on Varied Commoditied mod

 
### Additional
If you find a bug or want to add something of your own, write either to **dummoin5@gmail.com** or **Urged's Discord (fr1kst)**

Mod has maden by:  UrgedCrane and Kriperinq

CurseForge link: **https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/customnpc-contentback**
